languages.text: "Я знако{mf|м|ма} с вашим далеким потомком. Боюсь, его участь незавидна".

traits.locale_text: "Я знако{mf|м|ма} с вашим далеким потомком. Боюсь, его участь незавидна".

languages.text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."
languages.original_text: "Я знако{mf|м|ма} с вашим далеким потомком. Боюсь, его участь незавидна".

traits.locale_text: "I know your distant descendant. I'm afraid he suffered an unenviable fate."
"I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."
"I know your distant descendant. He met a sticky end."
"I know your distant descendant. I'm afraid he suffered an unenviable fate."
"I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."
"I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

languages.text: “是的。很遗憾，他的下场相当凄惨。”
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: “是的。很遗憾，他的下场相当凄惨。”

languages.text: « J'ai bien peu qu'il n'ait connu une fin peu enviable. »
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien peu qu'il n'ait connu une fin peu enviable. »

languages.text: "Bunu söylemekten üzüntü duyuyorum ama özenilmeyecek bir sonla karşılaştı."
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: "Bunu söylemekten üzüntü duyuyorum ama özenilmeyecek bir sonla karşılaştı."

languages.text: «Así es. Lamento decir que su destino no fue nada envidiable».
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: «Así es. Lamento decir que su destino no fue nada envidiable».

languages.text: "Das habe ich. Ich sage es nur ungern, aber er hat ein schreckliches Schicksal erlitten."
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: "Das habe ich. Ich sage es nur ungern, aber er hat ein schreckliches Schicksal erlitten."

languages.text: 「そうなんです。言いにくいのですが、彼は不幸な運命を辿りました。」
languages.original_text: "I have. I regret to say it, but he suffered an unenviable fate."

traits.locale_text: 「そうなんです。言いにくいのですが、彼は不幸な運命を辿りました。」
